summary: Comprehensive testing of Hui Fenua polynesian social network completed. Backend: 30/30 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All requested features verified working. Critical fix applied: Backend restart required to register email verification endpoints.

minor.issue: Endpoints were not visible in OpenAPI spec until backend was restarted. Routes were defined but not hot-reloaded properly.
minor.resolution: Backend restart via 'sudo supervisorctl restart backend' resolved the issue

passed_tests: ✅ API: Root endpoint returns welcome message
✅ API: manifest.json accessible and valid PWA config
✅ API: service-worker.js accessible
✅ API: POST /api/auth/login - Login with user1@test.com works
✅ API: POST /api/auth/login - Invalid password rejected (401)
✅ API: POST /api/auth/login - Invalid email format rejected
✅ API: POST /api/auth/register - Registration endpoint works
✅ API: GET /api/auth/me - Returns user data with session token
✅ API: POST /api/auth/logout - Logout works
✅ API: POST /api/auth/send-verification - Requires auth (401)
✅ API: POST /api/auth/send-verification - Returns verification code (MOCKED Resend)
✅ API: POST /api/auth/verify-email - Requires auth
✅ API: POST /api/auth/verify-email - Invalid code rejected
✅ API: GET /api/auth/verification-status - Returns email_verified status
✅ API: GET /api/posts - Returns feed posts
✅ API: GET /api/stories - Returns stories
✅ API: POST /api/translate - Translation works (fr_to_tah)
✅ API: GET /api/pulse/islands - Returns 9 islands
✅ API: GET /api/pulse/marker-types - Returns 9 types including 'carpool'
✅ API: GET /api/pulse/markers - Returns active markers
✅ API: GET /api/pulse/status - Returns pulse status
✅ API: Carpool filter works
✅ API: Island filter works
✅ API: GET /api/marketplace/products - Returns products
✅ API: GET /api/marketplace/categories - Returns categories (dict format)
✅ API: GET /api/conversations - Requires auth
✅ API: GET /api/conversations - Returns user conversations
✅ API: POST /api/auth/request-password-reset - Valid email accepted
✅ API: POST /api/auth/request-password-reset - Invalid email rejected
✅ API: POST /api/auth/request-password-reset - Unknown email handled (no enumeration)
✅ UI: Homepage landing page loads correctly
✅ UI: Login page - Email and password inputs work
✅ UI: Login redirects to /feed after success
✅ UI: Feed page - 20 translate buttons visible on posts
✅ UI: Feed page - Translation shows 'Traduit en Tahitien' toast
✅ UI: Feed page - 'Voir l'original' link appears after translation
✅ UI: Profile page - User profile displays correctly
✅ UI: Profile page - Déconnexion (logout) button visible in red
✅ UI: Fenua Pulse - Interactive map loads with Tahiti centered
✅ UI: Fenua Pulse - Island navigation buttons work
✅ UI: Fenua Pulse - Covoiturage filter visible with car emoji
✅ UI: Fenua Pulse - Zoom In/Out buttons work
✅ UI: Fenua Pulse - Ma position (locate me) button present
✅ UI: Forgot Password page - Form accessible at /forgot-password
✅ UI: Forgot Password - Email input and submit button work
✅ UI: Marketplace - Products listing with XPF prices
✅ UI: Marketplace - Category filters (Perles, Artisanat, etc.)
✅ UI: Chat/Messages - Conversation list with online indicators
✅ UI: Registration page - Name, Email, Password form
✅ UI: Registration - Google and Facebook social login options
critical_code_review_comments: Email sending via Resend is MOCKED (no RESEND_API_KEY configured) - Returns verification code in response for testing
Backend routes may not hot-reload properly after code changes - restart recommended after adding new endpoints

mocked_apis.Resend Email: Email sending via Resend is MOCKED. No API key configured - verification codes are returned in API response for testing purposes.

context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features tested and working. Backend restart was required once to load email verification endpoints. PWA manifest.json and service-worker.js are accessible. All navigation, Fenua Pulse map controls, translation buttons, and authentication flows work correctly. Session tokens are returned as 'session_token' in login response.

profile_deconnexion.styling: Red text button visible on profile page
